description: Shared definitions for the org.shelfcheck.* lexicon: status tokens, book identifiers, and structured author references.

wantToRead.description: The user wants to read this book.

reading.description: The user is currently reading this book.

finished.description: The user has finished reading this book.

abandoned.description: The user started but did not finish, and has stopped.

bookIds.description: Identifiers correlating a book across catalogs. At least one identifier should be present, with olWorkId preferred.

olWorkId.description: Open Library Work ID, e.g. 'OL45883W'. Edition-independent. Primary correlation key.

hiveId.description: BookHive canonical book id, present when imported from a buzz.bookhive.book record.

authorRef.description: Structured reference to an author of a book.
